rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0001
rows.name:
After we cross the Dannagh
Desert, it's the capital
city Aulrium, right?

rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0002
rows.name:
Dannagh Desert is a tough crossing,
but you'll see the palace. Aim for
it and you won't get lost.

rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0003
rows.name:
The palace must be incredibly
tall if you can see it
from that far away.

rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0004
rows.name:
It's so tall your neck will
hurt just looking up at it.

rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0005
rows.name:
Iiran technology is
high-level across the board.

rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0006
rows.name:
Building skyscrapers is
probably nothing for them.

rows.label: campfev11_530_175_msg0007
rows.name:
For all that talk, wasn't Adel's
place in Aletta pretty small?
